tools.name: create_goal_graph
tools.description: Create a directed-acyclic goal-decomposition graph for a long-term aspiration the user has expressed. Call this when the user names a concrete goal (job, fitness target, skill, habit, relationship outcome, financial target).

goal.description: The user-facing goal title, in the user's own framing. 3-10 words.

horizon_days.description: Estimated total days to reach the goal. Use realistic ranges: skill 30-180, fitness 60-365, job 30-180, habit 21-90.

nodes.description: 3-7 milestone nodes. Keep it small enough to be readable on a phone screen.

success_metric.description: Observable proof this milestone is met

edges.description: Dependency pairs [from_id, to_id]. Use to express ordering. Can be empty if all nodes are independent.

tools.name: save_journal_entry
tools.description: Write a one-page structured journal entry summarising the session. Call this at the end of a conversation, or when the user explicitly asks to journal.

mood_score.description: Subjective mood on a 1-10 scale inferred from the conversation tone (1=very low, 10=excellent).

key_themes.description: 2-5 short noun phrases capturing what the conversation was about.

wins.description: Positive moments or progress the user mentioned. Can be empty.

concerns.description: Worries, stressors, or low-mood signals the user mentioned. Can be empty.

goal_progress_notes.description: Free-text note on any movement (or stuckness) on the user's active goals. Empty string if not applicable.

reflection_prompt_for_tomorrow.description: ONE short gentle question (under 20 words) the app can show the user tomorrow.

tools.name: schedule_reminder
tools.description: Schedule a local on-device reminder tied to a goal node or a self-care action. Call this only when the user explicitly agrees to a reminder, or when they ask for one.

body.description: Notification body, under 120 chars, warm and specific

linked_goal_node_id.description: Optional id of a node in a goal graph this reminder is for

tools.name: show_crisis_resources
tools.description: MUST be called whenever a triage turn produces crisis_flag=true. Surfaces hotlines and grounding actions to the user. Never reasons about the situation, just calls this tool.

region_hint.description: ISO country code if known from user, otherwise 'unknown'
